---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new hook, agent, command, skill, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Component Type

What type of component is this?

- [ ] Hook (new pre/post tool validation)
- [ ] Agent (new review/analysis specialist)
- [ ] Command (new slash command workflow)
- [ ] Skill (new knowledge module)
- [ ] Output Style
- [ ] Improvement to existing component

## Description

A clear description of what you'd like to add or change.

## Use Case

Why is this useful? Describe the problem or workflow this addresses.

## Proposed Behavior

How should it work? Include example usage if possible.

```bash
# Example: how you'd use the new component
claude /your-new-command
```

## Language Support

Which languages/stacks does this apply to?

- [ ] Kotlin / Spring Boot
- [ ] TypeScript / Next.js
- [ ] Python / FastAPI
- [ ] Language-agnostic

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.
